name: Garlic and Shrimp Veggies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together 1/2 cup chicken stock, 2 tablespoons cornstarch, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, and 1/2 teaspoon sugar.
2. Saute the celery and cabbage until soft.
3. Add the garlic and onions to the mixture.
4. Add the thawed peas and water chestnuts.
5. Add the shrimp and cook on medium heat until they turn pink.
6. Pour in the liquid ingredients from step 1 and stir until thickened.
7. Serve over cooked rice. For extra flavor, add additional soy sauce as desired.
Good luck with your cooking! Enjoy a great spring season!
